title: Journey Beyond
description: Journey to a plethora of new worlds. Encounter a multitude of new enemies and bosses to test your abilities. Become one of the Vampires or one of the Hunters. Embark on an unforgettable Journey Beyond!
body:
## The Preface
Journey Beyond is a Mineraft 1.20.4 Modpack using the NeoForge Loader. The pack adds a variety of some of the latest Mods currently availble for NeoForge and 1.20.4. The focus of the pack is Exploration and Aventure. The pack contains splashes of Tech and Magic to keep things interesting as well as many storage solutions for the rather plentiful amounts of loot you will obtain on your Journey.

## The Core
The Core of this Modpack is Dimension Travel with one of the big stars being **Advent of Ascension**. This pack will take you on as Journey Beyond the Overworld, Nether and The End. You have so much more to explore. The Aether, The Bumblezone, Ad Astra and its Planets, The Undergarden, just to name a few. Grand adventures are to be had.

## The Mechanics
This pack contains Advent of Ascension which has its own built in skill system that will allow you to play the game in a new way. You also have Vampirism, so perhpas you are looking to be one who seeks nourishment in that way. There is a large number of new Weapons and Bows and Armors to use at your disposal, because you will certainly need it with some of the new Bosses and Mobs introduced in this pack. 

## The Techy Magic
As mentioned there are splashes of Magic and Tech in the Modpack to help you play in a unique style. Fancy some Immersive Engineering? Perhaps some Nature's Aure or Totemic? It is here, along with plenty of others.

## The World Gen
Biomes of Plenty and Structures Galore you will have a grand time explorings and uncovering treasures even in the Overworld. Go out and explore! You will find tons of goodies and treasures and maybe even some Fossils with unique abilities.

## The Builders
You are not forgotten. You have such a large amount of blocks and materials at your disposal, your limitation is only your imagination. Diagonal Walls? Windows? Fences? Yep, it is here. Perhaps some Chipped or Chiseled blocks. Sure thing. Go crazy with your builds and enjoy yourself you have the ability. Go Journey Beyond to collect new resources to even further your block pallett.

## So much more
There is so much more that I will not spoil. Go look through the Modlist if you desire. The potential is limitless.

![BisectHosting Partner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a73d3ce4-111e-4583-9d2b-7801c8c1db0a.webp)
# What are you waiting for? Journey Beyond!
